textByHashes.0b91ce03a50a1b619b6161cd71e2fdc79c92a7cd: You sshould not be down here...
textByHashes.0d85dda5560a0f6cf34d030a6980ac9afb76979c: I usssed to have that honour... Why do you ssseek me?

textByHashes.080c736bbeffae92ea8ec3fa6a5f0dd2d3e31c40: Ah, I sssee... Yesss, I know how to make sssuch an item... It has been many yearsss sssince I have needed to however...
textByHashes.a3db855a6290cbcafc342b08ef0dbe6a5b6aad1c: It is not my wisssh to quessstion your desssire for sssuch an item. I wasss merely sssurprisssed that one sssuch as you would make sssuch a requessst...
textByHashes.5176233894759a0202bdcd3a7e575d7a20544274: I will happily make you thisss pot, but you mussst bring me a bar of sssilver... Alasss, I can no longer collect my own ingredientsss, and mussst remain here...

textByHashes.200d1d1f98d68b85965797452524a74c98ad1ca0: Thisss isss where I belong... Beingsss sssuch as myssself cannot abide in the light... It is in the darknesss where we find our homesss...
